# Let's load the provided file
path = "/mnt/data/file-C8KAsEL9jSViL4hBBnHUGo-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    text = f.read()
len(text), text[:500]

import re, json, textwrap, sys, unicodedata
print(text)

# Let's find all substrings in double quotes "..." 
dq_spans = [(m.start(), m.end(), m.group(0)) for m in re.finditer(r'"[^"]*"', text)]
len(dq_spans), dq_spans[:10]

target = "كَمَنْ هُوَ أعمى"
list((m.start(), m.end(), m.group(0)) for m in re.finditer(re.escape(target), text))[:10]

ayah2 = "وَمَا أَنتَ بِمُؤْمِنٍ لِّنَا"
[(m.start(), m.end()) for m in re.finditer(re.escape(ayah2), text)]

# Extract the text after "قال عز من قائل: " up to " [آل عمران: ١٨]"
start_phrase = "قال عز من قائل: "
start_idx = text.find(start_phrase)
start_idx, text[start_idx:start_idx+200]

start = start_idx + len("قال عز من قائل: ")
end = text.find(" [آل عمران", start)
span = text[start:end]
start, end, span

# Build entries
entries = []

# Add dq spans - inside content
dq_spans = [(m.start(), m.end()) for m in re.finditer(r'"[^"]*"', text)]
for i,(s,e) in enumerate(dq_spans):
    inner_start = s+1
    inner_end = e-1
    span_text = text[inner_start:inner_end]
    entries.append({"span_start": inner_start, "span_end": inner_end, "span_text": span_text})

entries

# Add the "كمَن هو أعمى" span
entries.append({"span_start": 1724, "span_end": 1740, "span_text": text[1724:1740]})

# Add "وَمَا أَنتَ بِمُؤْمِنٍ لِّنَا"
entries.append({"span_start": 1996, "span_end": 2025, "span_text": text[1996:2025]})

# Add "شَهِدَ اللهُ ..."
entries.append({"span_start": 2398, "span_end": 2502, "span_text": text[2398:2502]})

entries

# verify contexts around each span
for c in citations:
    s, e = c["span_start"], c["span_end"]
    context = text[s-5:e+5]
    print(c["citation_type"], s, e, repr(context))
